disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms began suddenly within about an hour of reading an abnormal screening result online and researching it
trigger_question_examples: When did this start and what was happening just before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It all came on about an hour ago, right after I read my test results online and started looking up what stomach antibodies mean.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Racing/pounding heart and a subjective sense that something catastrophic is happening
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe what your heart feels like?
What are you most worried is happening?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart is pounding and racing really fast and I feel like something terrible is about to happen — I think I might be bleeding inside.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Nausea and an upper-abdominal tight/squeezing sensation without true localised pain
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly do you feel it and what does it feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel sick and there's a tight squeezing feeling high up in my stomach, but I couldn't point to one sore spot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling short of breath and breathing fast
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble breathing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel like I can't quite catch my breath and I'm breathing really fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting of blood or coffee-ground material
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited at all, or seen any blood or dark material when you did?
Any vomiting of blood or something that looks like coffee grounds?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't been sick and I haven't seen any blood or anything like coffee grounds.

trigger_question_examples: Have your bowel motions been normal, or black and sticky/tarry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — my bowel motions have looked normal.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fainting, blackout, or feeling faint on standing
trigger_question_examples: Have you fainted or felt like you were going to pass out, especially standing up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't fainted or felt like I'd pass out — even when I stand up I'm okay.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The precipitant was misreading an incidental screening finding; the patient has been researching gastric cancer online and fears cancer or internal bleeding
trigger_question_examples: What did the result say, and what are you most afraid it means?
What have you been reading about it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The report mentioned stomach antibodies. I've had loads of tabs open reading about stomach cancer and I'm terrified it means I've got cancer or I'm bleeding inside.
